fields.Format: The type of audio file to make.
fields.Quality: The quality of the resulting audio clip file.
fields.Mode: Whether the user has to hold or it's a toggle.
fields.Source: The way to record the audio.
fields.RecordingUser: The user that is currently recording using the Tool.
fields.RecordingStartTime: The time that the user started recording in world time.
fields.IsRecording: Whether the tool is currently being used to record.
